title: voyria chionea
intro: Voyria chionea, also known as the wintergreen or pine heath, is a flowering plant in the gentian family. It is native to the mountainous regions of North America and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in its leaves and stems, which contain methyl salicylate, a compound similar to aspirin. The health benefits of Voyria chionea include its anti-inflammatory and analgesic properties, which can help alleviate pain and reduce inflammation. Voyria chionea is typically prepared as a tea or tincture, and can also be made into a salve or infused oil for topical use.
